title: Ginger Ray Valentines Day Treasure Hunt Heart Design Envelope Kit - 10 Pack Game
features: Get creative this year with our Valentines Day Treasure Hunt Kit
Each Valentine's Day Treasure Hunt Kit includes 10 envelopes
Part of the Ginger Ray I Heart You Range
description: Have fun with your special someone this year with our fun Treasure Hunt Kit - the ultimate Valentines day game.Each pack comes with blank cards for you to fill out clues for your partner. Watch their face whilst they have fun trying to find the treasure!Each Valentine's Day Treasure Hunt Kit includes 10 envelopes - 9 x 10cm W x 8cm H clue envelopes and 1 with just a note to say" envelope measuring 12cm W x 10cm H."
